code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{getHistory}from'../services/resume';import{DocumentTextIcon,ChartBarIcon,AcademicCapIcon,ArrowPathIcon}from'@heroicons/react/24/outline';import StatsCard from'../components/Dashboard/StatsCard';import HistoryList from'../components/Dashboard/HistoryList';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Dashboard=()=>{const[history,setHistory]=useState([]);const[stats,setStats]=useState({total:0,avgAts:0,highestMatch:0});const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{loadHistory();},[]);const loadHistory=async()=>{try{const data=await getHistory();setHistory(data);if(data.length>0){const avg=data.reduce((acc,curr)=>acc+curr.atsScore,0)/data.length;const highest=Math.max(...data.map(item=>item.matchPercentage));setStats({total:data.length,avgAts:Math.round(avg*10)/10,highestMatch:highest});}}catch(error){console.error('Failed to load history:',error);}finally{setLoading(false);}};if(loading){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex items-center justify-center min-h-screen",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"text-center",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ArrowPathIcon,{className:"h-12 w-12 text-indigo-600 animate-spin mx-auto mb-4"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-gray-600",children:"Loading your dashboard..."})]})});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-8",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900",children:"Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-gray-600 mt-1",children:"Welcome back!
